response.justification: Candidate has roughly 14-16 years of broad full-stack engineering experience but the resume shows no evidence of the AI/ML depth, cloud platform strategy work, or director-level technical leadership the role requires. AI exposure is limited to recent MCP tooling contributions, and there is no record of building recognized AI products, advising strategic customers, or operating at principal/director IC scope.
strengths: Long, varied engineering tenure across web, mobile, embedded, and microservices
Some recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling at re:cinq
Founder experience with GISCollective shows entrepreneurial initiative
concerns: No demonstrated AI/ML expertise or shipped AI products at platform scale
No cloud platform strategy or principal-level advisory experience
Lacks evidence of director-level IC influence or external thought leadership in AI

key_factors.factor: AI expertise gap vs. principal AI strategy role
No cloud platform or strategic advisory background
Long engineering tenure and entrepreneurial track record
